title: BEM-854 execute 853 route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:08 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem853_verify_dispatch_pipeline_probe.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
patched=[]
if ps=='dispatch_results_exist':
    status='parse_dispatch_results_next'
    next_action='parse dispatch result status and continue to Claude runtime proof'
elif ps=='processor_marker_exists_no_results':
    proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
    if proc.exists():
        txt=proc.read_text(errors='ignore')
        if 'summary.status.json' not in txt:
            txt=txt.replace('echo "processed_queue_items=$count"', 'printf \'{"status":"processor_completed","processed_queue_items":%s,"time":"%s"}\\n\' "$count" "$now" > governance/workflow_dispatch_results/summary.status.json\necho "processed_queue_items=$count"')
            proc.write_text(txt)
            patched.append(str(proc))
    status='processor_result_writer_patched_or_confirmed'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify dispatch results'
elif ps=='processor_step_not_running':
    runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
    txt=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
    insert='''\n      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue\n        if: always()\n        env:\n          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}\n        run: bash scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh\n      - name: Commit workflow dispatch queue results\n        if: always()\n        run: bash scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh\n'''
    if runner.exists() and 'Process workflow dispatch queue' not in txt:
        marker='      - name: Complete job'
        if marker in txt: txt=txt.replace(marker,insert+marker,1)
        else: txt=txt+insert
        runner.write_text(txt)
        patched.append(str(runner))
    status='runner_queue_step_patched_or_confirmed'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify processor marker/results'
else:
    status='unknown_route'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-853 status'
state={'bem':'BEM-854','status':status,'bem853_status':ps,'patched':patched,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem854_execute_bem853_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem854_execute_bem853_route.md').write_text('# BEM-854 | Execute BEM-853 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem854_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-854'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem854_execute_bem853_route.json','governance/reports/bem854_execute_bem853_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem854_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+patched
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-853 route by parsing path or patching queue processor result writer / runner step placement')
"""
No issue comments.
